# River width calculation using trigonometry

## Short Teaching Summary
River width calculation using trigonometry: Trigonometry can be used to find the width of a river when two different angles of elevation to an object on the opposite bank are known from two different points on the near bank. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
